meaning: n.布里斯托尔,英国西部的港口
examples: Has the train from Bristol arrived?
It's about halfway between London and Bristol.
He picked up two hitchhikers on the road to Bristol.
After six years Bristol-Myers has narrowed the hunt to two drugs, BMS184476 and BMS188797.
Merck and Bristol-Myers Squibb lose patent protection on Zocor and Pravachol next year, removing any incentive.
